scripts.setup: cd "$HELMOR_WORKSPACE_PATH" && npm ci && npm run sync:tokens
scripts.archive: sh -lc 'set -eu; cd "${HELMOR_WORKSPACE_PATH:?}"; mkdir -p .context; latest_handoff=$(ls -1t handoff/*-handoff.md 2>/dev/null | head -n 1 || true); { echo "# Helmor Archive Context"; echo; echo "- Workspace: ${HELMOR_WORKSPACE_NAME:-unknown}"; echo "- Workspace path: ${HELMOR_WORKSPACE_PATH:-$(pwd)}"; echo "- Root path: ${HELMOR_ROOT_PATH:-unknown}"; echo "- Default branch: ${HELMOR_DEFAULT_BRANCH:-unknown}"; echo "- Archived at: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"; echo "- Current branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || true)"; echo "- HEAD: $(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || true)"; echo; echo "## Git Status"; git status --short --branch 2>/dev/null || true; echo; echo "## Latest Handoff"; if [ -n "$latest_handoff" ]; then echo "- File: $latest_handoff"; echo; sed -n "1,80p" "$latest_handoff"; else echo "No handoff file found."; fi; } > .context/helmor-archive.md; echo "Wrote .context/helmor-archive.md"'
